sections.paragraph:
βαπτισμός, οῦ, ὁ [βαπτίζω; found only in Christian writers] ‘a washing with ceremonial focus’

—a. of various ritual lustrations washing, cleansing Mk 7:4, 8 v.l.; Hb 9:10.

—b. in a special sense, of the Christian water-rite as burial with Christ plunging experience, baptism Col 2:12.

—c. Hb 6:2 refers to matters concerning lustration under discussion in the Christian community and including, but not necessarily limited to, items in a and b.
